matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: NCSU Hough plate 278 prints Aesculus Octandra, Marsh. and labels its radial wood section. The printed binomial matches the atlas name Aesculus octandra.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Native-resolution crop of the plate’s explicitly labeled radial physical wood face. Visually reviewed: exposed wood specimen only; no tree, leaf, bark-only view, furniture, or microscopy. No upscaling was applied.
matchedCandidate.creator: Romeyn B. Hough; digitized by NCSU Libraries
matchedCandidate.rightsNotes: NCSU provides the reproduction for research access and asks users to credit the source and assess publication rights.

matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: NCSU Hough plate 278 prints Aesculus Octandra, Marsh. and labels its tangential wood section. The printed binomial matches the atlas name Aesculus octandra.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Native-resolution crop of the plate’s explicitly labeled tangential physical wood face. Visually reviewed: exposed wood specimen only; no tree, leaf, bark-only view, furniture, or microscopy. No upscaling was applied.
matchedCandidate.creator: Romeyn B. Hough; digitized by NCSU Libraries
matchedCandidate.rightsNotes: NCSU provides the reproduction for research access and asks users to credit the source and assess publication rights.
